cases.title: 中文空回答
cases.question: 请介绍一次你推动项目落地的经历。
cases.user_answer: 不知道，暂时没有。

cases.title: English empty answer
cases.question: Tell me about a difficult problem you solved.
cases.user_answer: I cannot think of one right now.

cases.title: 中文明显偏题
cases.question: 为什么你适合产品经理岗位？
cases.user_answer: 我平时喜欢跑步，也很喜欢旅行，去过很多城市。

cases.title: English off-topic answer
cases.question: Why are you a good fit for this analyst role?
cases.user_answer: The office is close to my apartment and I like the city.
expected_diagnosis: Motivation is unrelated to role fit

cases.title: STAR 缺少个人行动
cases.question: 请讲一次你解决跨团队冲突的经历。
cases.user_answer: 两个团队对指标口径有分歧，后来大家开会讨论并统一了口径，项目按时完成。
expected_diagnosis: 无法判断候选人的贡献

cases.title: English STAR missing result
cases.question: Tell me about a time you improved a process.
cases.user_answer: Our weekly report was manual, so I mapped the steps, wrote a SQL query, and built a scheduled dashboard.

cases.title: 中文模糊结果
cases.question: 请讲一个你提升效率的案例。
cases.user_answer: 我做了一个自动化报表，帮团队节省了很多时间，效果非常明显。
expected_diagnosis: 缺少原耗时、现耗时或频率

cases.title: English vague result
cases.question: Describe an efficiency improvement you delivered.
cases.user_answer: I automated a report and it saved the team a lot of time. The outcome was significant.

cases.title: 中文仅有工具清单
cases.question: 请介绍你最有代表性的项目。
cases.user_answer: 我用了 Python、SQL、Pandas、Tableau、Excel 和 Git。
expected_diagnosis: 工具清单不能证明实际贡献

cases.title: English tool list only
cases.question: Walk me through your most relevant project.
cases.user_answer: I used Python, SQL, pandas, Tableau, Excel, and Git.

cases.title: 中文有可核验指标
cases.question: 请讲一次你提升运营效率的经历。
cases.user_answer: 每周报表原来需要两名运营各花三小时整理。我确认口径后用 SQL 和定时任务自动生成，连续四周记录的平均准备时间降到 25 分钟。
expected_diagnosis: 可以补充业务采用情况

cases.title: English verifiable metric
cases.question: Tell me about an operational improvement.
cases.user_answer: Two operators each spent three hours on the weekly report. I aligned definitions and scheduled the SQL pipeline; over four weeks, average preparation time fell to 25 minutes.

cases.title: 中英混合但主语言为中文
cases.question: 请介绍你如何定位数据问题。
cases.user_answer: 我先确认 metric definition，再检查 upstream table。最后发现 join key 重复，所以我增加 uniqueness check 并修复了 dashboard。

cases.title: English answer with Chinese terms
cases.question: How did you resolve a data quality issue?
cases.user_answer: I first 对齐指标口径 with operations, then traced the upstream tables and found duplicate join keys. I added a uniqueness check before refreshing the dashboard.

cases.title: 中文自我介绍流水账
cases.question: 请做一下自我介绍。
cases.user_answer: 我先上了大学，然后做了两份实习，毕业后工作了一年，现在想换工作。
expected_diagnosis: 经历没有连接到目标岗位

cases.title: English focused introduction
cases.question: Please introduce yourself.
cases.user_answer: I am an operations analyst focused on turning recurring questions into reusable data products. In my last role I standardized weekly merchant metrics and built a self-service dashboard. I am now looking to apply that problem-framing experience in a product analytics team.

cases.title: 中文弱点伪装成优点
cases.question: 你最大的不足是什么？
cases.user_answer: 我最大的不足是太追求完美，经常工作得太认真。

cases.title: English credible weakness
cases.question: What is one weakness you are working on?
cases.user_answer: I used to start analysis before confirming the decision the stakeholder needed. After one dashboard was underused, I added a short decision-and-owner checklist to project kickoffs. I still ask a teammate to challenge the question before I build.
expected_diagnosis: Weakness and corrective action are credible

cases.title: 中文冲突题只有团队行动
cases.question: 请讲一次你处理意见分歧的经历。
cases.user_answer: 我们有不同意见，后来团队充分沟通，互相理解后达成了一致。

cases.title: English conflict with trade-off
cases.question: Tell me about a disagreement with a stakeholder.
cases.user_answer: Sales wanted revenue reported at booking while finance used settlement. I documented how each definition changed the weekly trend, facilitated a review with both owners, and proposed one financial metric plus a labelled operational view. Both teams adopted the definitions in the reporting guide.

cases.title: 中文失败题无反思
cases.question: 请讲一次失败经历。
cases.user_answer: 我做的项目最后没有上线，因为业务需求后来变了，这不是我能控制的。

cases.title: English failure with reflection
cases.question: Tell me about a project that failed.
cases.user_answer: I built a dashboard before confirming who would use it, and adoption was low. I interviewed the intended users, learned their decision happened in a weekly spreadsheet, and replaced the dashboard with an export integrated into that meeting. Since then I validate the decision and workflow before choosing a format.
expected_diagnosis: Ownership and changed behavior are clear

cases.title: 中文领导力只说负责
cases.question: 请讲一次你展现领导力的经历。
cases.user_answer: 我当时是负责人，所以我分配了任务，最后大家一起把项目做完了。
expected_diagnosis: 领导行为只有任务分配

cases.title: English leadership without authority
cases.question: Tell me about a time you led without formal authority.
cases.user_answer: Three analysts maintained conflicting metric definitions. I created a comparison, asked each owner to list downstream decisions, and facilitated agreement on a shared dictionary and review process. I did not manage the analysts, but all three teams moved their reports to the agreed definitions.
expected_diagnosis: Could provide a time or quality metric

cases.title: 中文优先级回答无方法
cases.question: 多项任务同时到来时你如何确定优先级？
cases.user_answer: 我会先做最重要的，然后加班把其他任务也完成。

cases.title: English prioritization framework
cases.question: How do you prioritize competing requests?
cases.user_answer: I compare decision deadline, user impact, reversibility, and effort, then make the trade-off visible to request owners. Last quarter I delayed a cosmetic dashboard change to fix a revenue reconciliation issue needed for month-end, and agreed a new date with the first requester.
expected_diagnosis: Decision criteria and trade-off are explicit
Could state the result of the reconciliation fix

cases.title: 中文公司动机通用
cases.question: 为什么想加入我们公司？
cases.user_answer: 贵公司发展很好，平台很大，我希望学习和成长。
expected_diagnosis: 没有连接个人经历与岗位问题

cases.title: English specific motivation
cases.question: Why do you want to join this product analytics team?
cases.user_answer: The role owns experimentation from question design through decision review, which matches the work I want to deepen. In my current role I built recurring KPI reporting; I now want to apply that foundation to hypothesis testing and product decisions rather than reporting alone.
expected_diagnosis: Role motivation and transition logic are clear

cases.title: 中文岗位匹配只有学历
cases.question: 为什么你适合数据分析岗位？
cases.user_answer: 我读的是统计学专业，成绩也不错，所以我觉得我适合。
expected_diagnosis: 没有展示如何解决实际问题

cases.title: English role fit with evidence
cases.question: Why are you a fit for this data analyst role?
cases.user_answer: I combine metric definition, SQL implementation, and stakeholder communication. For a merchant review, I aligned three teams on active-user logic, built the query and dashboard, and documented the definition so the weekly meeting used one number. Those are the same responsibilities emphasized in this role.
expected_diagnosis: Capabilities are tied to a relevant example
Could add a measured business outcome

cases.title: 中文项目细节多但结论晚
cases.question: 请介绍一个最有代表性的项目。
cases.user_answer: 先是业务来找我，然后我开了几次会，看了很多表，也试了不同 SQL。中间数据还有问题，我又找工程师修。最后做成看板，主要体现了我能处理模糊问题。
expected_diagnosis: 核心能力结论出现太晚
过程细节缺少清晰分组

cases.title: English conclusion-first project
cases.question: Describe your most representative project.
cases.user_answer: My most representative project shows how I turn ambiguous operations questions into governed metrics. I aligned three teams on merchant activity definitions, traced source-table gaps with engineering, and shipped a dashboard plus data dictionary used in the weekly review.
expected_diagnosis: Core message and actions are concise

cases.title: 中文 STAR 缺少任务
cases.question: 请讲一次你应对紧急问题的经历。
cases.user_answer: 月末数据出了问题。我检查日志、回溯 SQL，并和工程师一起修复，第二天数据恢复正常。

cases.title: English result without action
cases.question: Tell me about an achievement you are proud of.
cases.user_answer: Our dashboard became the main source for weekly planning and report preparation time dropped by 70 percent.
expected_diagnosis: Strong result but personal contribution is unknown

cases.title: 中文行动过长结果一句带过
cases.question: 请讲一个你解决复杂问题的经历。
cases.user_answer: 我先查日志，又查 SQL，然后对字段、做抽样、写脚本、开会、改逻辑、做回归、补文档，还给大家培训，最后问题解决了。
expected_diagnosis: 行动缺少关键判断节点

cases.title: English answer with exact facts
cases.question: Describe a product decision you supported.
cases.user_answer: On 14 March, I presented a seven-day retention cut for the North region. The sample contained 1,842 activated users, and the analysis showed a 6.3-point gap between the two onboarding paths. I recommended validating event instrumentation before changing the flow.
expected_diagnosis: Outcome of the recommendation is not stated

cases.title: 中文无数字禁止补造
cases.question: 请讲一次你改善用户体验的经历。
cases.user_answer: 用户反馈导出步骤很难找。我整理反馈并和设计师调整入口，上线后客服说相关询问减少了。
expected_diagnosis: 有问题、行动和观察结果
没有量化数据，不应补造比例

cases.title: 中英混合含精确事实
cases.question: 请说明一次实验分析。
cases.user_answer: 我分析了 checkout A/B test，control 有 2,104 users，variant 有 2,087 users。conversion difference 是 0.8 percentage point，但 confidence interval 跨过 0，所以我建议继续收集数据。

cases.title: English no-metric answer
cases.question: Tell me about a time your analysis changed a decision.
cases.user_answer: The team planned to remove a low-use filter. I segmented usage by customer tier and showed that enterprise users relied on it during monthly reviews, so the team kept the filter and scheduled user research before redesigning it.
expected_diagnosis: Analysis is connected to a decision
No measured magnitude; rewrite must not invent one

cases.title: 混合语言完整 STAR
cases.question: Tell me about a time you influenced a decision.
cases.user_answer: 运营团队想立刻暂停一个渠道。我把用户按 acquisition week 分组，发现整体下滑主要来自 tracking gap，不是渠道质量。我用中文向运营解释口径，并和 engineering 修复 event mapping。团队先暂停决策，数据修复后再复盘。
expected_diagnosis: 问题、证据、影响决策与结果完整
可以补充下滑幅度但不得编造
